Project Objectives  
AUTOSAR FO Release 1.5.0    
4 of 11 Document ID 599: AUTOSAR_R S_ProjectObjectives  
- AUTOSAR confidential  - 
Table of Content  
1 Scope of the document  :  :  :   5 
2 How to read this document  :  :  :   6 
2.1 Conventions used  :  :  :  . 6 
3 The AUTOSAR project objectives  :  :  :   7 
3.1 [RS_PO_00001] AUTOSAR shall support the transferability of software.  :   7 
3.2 [RS_PO_00002] AUTOSAR shall support the scalability to different vehicle 
and platform variants.  :  :  :   7 
3.3 [RS_PO_00003] AUTOSAR shall support a broad variety of functional 
domains. :  :  :  :   7 
3.4 [RS_PO_00004] AUTOSAR shall define an open architecture for 
automotive software.  :  :  :   8 
3.5 [RS_PO_0000 5] AUTOSAR shall support the development of dependable 
systems.  :  :  :  :   8 
3.6 [RS_PO_00006] AUTOSAR shall support sustainable u tilization of natural 
resources.  :  :  :  :   9 
3.7 [RS_PO_00007] AUTOSAR shall support the collaboration between various 
partners.  :  :  :  :   9 
3.8 [RS_PO_00008] AUTOSAR shall standardize basic software functionality of 
automotive ECUs.  :  :  :   10 
3.9 [RS_PO_00009] AUTOSAR shall support applicable international 
automotive standards and state -of-the-art technologies.  :  ... 10 
4 References  :  :  :  :   11
